heading: Backup withholding
label: 3406 Backup withholding
notes: References in TextSection 1(c), referred to in subsec. (a)(1), to be treated, for purposes of the rate of tax, as a reference to the corresponding rate bracket under , see .section 1(j)(2)(C) of this titlesection 1(j)(2)(F) of this title

L. 119–21, § 70432(b)(1)2008—Subsec. (b)(3)(F). added subpar. (F).Pub. L. 110–2892001—Subsec. children.heading: Requirement to deduct and withhold
children.label: a Requirement to deduct and withhold
A
children.text: the payee fails to furnish his TIN to the payor in the manner required,

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary notifies the payor that the TIN furnished by the payee is incorrect,

children.label: C
children.text: there has been a notified payee underreporting described in subsection (c), or

children.label: D
children.text: there has been a payee certification failure described in subsection (d),

children.heading: Subparagraphs (C) and (D) of paragraph (1) apply only to interest and dividend payments
children.label: 2 Subparagraphs (C) and (D) of paragraph (1) apply only to interest and dividend payments
children.text: Subparagraphs (C) and (D) of paragraph (1) shall apply only to reportable interest or dividend payments.

children.label: A
children.text: any reportable interest or dividend payment, and

children.label: B
children.text: any other reportable payment.

children.label: i
children.text: section 6049(a) (relating to payments of interest),

children.label: ii
children.text: section 6042(a) (relating to payments of dividends), or

children.label: iii
children.text: section 6044 (relating to payments of patronage dividends) but only to the extent such payment is in money.

children.heading: Special rule for patronage dividends
children.label: B Special rule for patronage dividends
children.text: For purposes of subparagraphs (C) and (D) of subsection (a)(1), the term “reportable interest or dividend payment” shall not include any payment to which section 6044 (relating to patronage dividends) applies unless 50 percent or more of such payment is in money.

children.label: A
children.text: section 6041 (relating to certain information at source),

children.label: B
children.text: section 6041A(a) (relating to payments of remuneration for services),

children.label: C
children.text: section 6045 (relating to returns of brokers),

children.label: D
children.text: section 6050A (relating to reporting requirements of certain fishing boat operators), but only to the extent such payment is in money and represents a share of the proceeds of the catch,

children.label: E
children.text: section 6050N (relating to payments of royalties), or

children.label: F
children.text: section 6050W (relating to returns relating to payments made in settlement of payment card transactions).

children.heading: Whether payment is of reportable kind determined without regard to minimum amount
children.label: 4 Whether payment is of reportable kind determined without regard to minimum amount
children.text: The determination of whether any payment is of a kind required to be shown on a return described in paragraph (2) or (3) shall be made without regard to any minimum amount which must be paid before a return is required.

children.label: A
children.text: does not exceed $10, and

children.label: B
children.text: if determined for a 1-year period, would not exceed $10.

children.heading: Other reportable payments include payments described in section 6041(a) or 6041A(a) only where in excess of threshold
children.label: 6 Other reportable payments include payments described in section 6041(a) or 6041A(a) only where in excess of threshold
A
children.text: the aggregate amount of such payment and all previous payments described in such sections by the payor to the payee during such calendar year equals or exceeds the dollar amount in effect for such calendar year under section 6041(a),

children.label: B
children.text: the payor was required under section 6041(a) or 6041A(a) to file a return for the preceding calendar year with respect to payments to the payee, or

children.label: C
children.text: during the preceding calendar year, the payor made reportable payments to the payee with respect to which amounts were required to be deducted and withheld under subsection (a).

children.heading: Exception for certain window payments of interest, etc.
children.label: 7 Exception for certain window payments of interest, etc.
A
children.text: in redemption of a coupon on a bearer instrument or in redemption of a United States savings bond, or

children.label: B
children.text: to the extent provided in regulations, of interest on instruments similar to those described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Other reportable payments include payments in settlement of third party network transactions only where aggregate transactions exceed reporting threshold for the calendar year
children.label: 8 Other reportable payments include payments in settlement of third party network transactions only where aggregate transactions exceed reporting threshold for the calendar year
i
children.text: the aggregate number of transactions with respect to the participating payee during such calendar year exceeds the number of transactions specified in section 6050W(e)(2), and

children.label: ii
children.text: the aggregate amount of transactions with respect to the participating payee during such calendar year exceeds the dollar amount specified in section 6050W(e)(1) at the time of such payment.

children.heading: Exception if third party network transactions made in prior year were reportable
children.label: B Exception if third party network transactions made in prior year were reportable
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply with respect to payments to any participating payee during any calendar year if one or more payments in settlement of third party network transactions made by the payor to the participating payee during the preceding calendar year were reportable payments.

children.heading: Notified payee underreporting with respect to interest and dividends
children.label: c Notified payee underreporting with respect to interest and dividends
A
children.text: the Secretary determines with respect to any payee that there has been payee underreporting,

children.label: B
children.text: at least 4 notices have been mailed by the Secretary to the payee (over a period of at least 120 days) with respect to the underreporting, and

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of any payee who has filed a return for the taxable year, any deficiency of tax attributable to such failure has been assessed,

children.label: A
children.text: the payee failed to include in his return of tax under chapter 1 for such year any portion of a reportable interest or dividend payment required to be shown on such return, or

children.label: B
children.text: the payee may be required to file a return for such year and to include a reportable interest or dividend payment in such return, but failed to file such return.

children.heading: Determination by Secretary to stop (or not to start) withholding
children.label: 3 Determination by Secretary to stop (or not to start) withholding
i
children.text: there was no payee underreporting,

children.label: ii
children.text: any payee underreporting has been corrected (and any tax, penalty, or interest with respect to the payee underreporting has been paid),

children.label: iii
children.text: withholding under subsection (a)(1)(C) has caused (or would cause) undue hardship to the payee and it is unlikely that any payee underreporting by such payee will occur again, or

children.label: iv
children.text: there is a bona fide dispute as to whether there has been any payee underreporting,

children.heading: Secretary to take action to stop (or not to start) withholding
children.label: B Secretary to take action to stop (or not to start) withholding
i
children.text: no notice has been given under paragraph (1) to any payor with respect to the underreporting, the Secretary shall not give any such notice, or

children.label: I
children.text: provide the payee with a written certification that withholding under subsection (a)(1)(C) is to stop, and

children.label: II
children.text: notify the applicable payors (and brokers) that such withholding is to stop.

children.heading: Time for taking action where notice to payor has been given
children.label: C Time for taking action where notice to payor has been given
i
children.text: except as provided in clause (ii), the Secretary shall take the action described in subparagraph (B)(ii) to bring about the stopping of withholding no later than December 1 of such calendar year, or

children.label: I
children.text: a no payee underreporting determination under clause (i) of subparagraph (A), or

children.label: II
children.text: a hardship determination under clause (iii) of subparagraph (A),

children.label: i
children.text: a payee may request a determination under subparagraph (A), and

children.label: ii
children.text: the payee may provide information with respect to such request.

children.heading: Payor notifies payee of withholding because of payee underreporting
children.label: 4 Payor notifies payee of withholding because of payee underreporting
children.text: Any payor required to withhold any tax under subsection (a)(1)(C) shall, at the time such withholding begins, notify the payee of such withholding.

children.heading: Payee may be required to notify Secretary who his payors and brokers are
children.label: 5 Payee may be required to notify Secretary who his payors and brokers are
A
children.text: all payors from whom the payee receives reportable interest or dividend payments, and

children.label: B
children.text: all brokers with whom the payee has accounts which may involve reportable interest or dividend payments.

children.heading: Interest and dividend backup withholding applies to new accounts and instruments unless payee certifies that he is not subject to such withholding
children.label: d Interest and dividend backup withholding applies to new accounts and instruments unless payee certifies that he is not subject to such withholding

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is a payee certification failure unless the payee has certified to the payor, under penalty of perjury, that such payee is not subject to withholding under subsection (a)(1)(C).

children.heading: Special rules for readily tradable instruments
children.label: 2 Special rules for readily tradable instruments
i
children.text: such instrument was acquired directly by the payee from the payor, or

children.label: ii
children.text: such instrument is held by the payor as nominee for the payee.

children.label: i
children.text: a payee acquires any readily tradable instrument through a broker, and

children.label: I
children.text: the payee fails to furnish his TIN to the broker in the manner required under subsection (a)(1)(A),

children.label: II
children.text: the Secretary notifies such broker before such acquisition that the TIN furnished by the payee is incorrect,

children.label: III
children.text: the Secretary notifies such broker before such acquisition that such payee is subject to withholding under subsection (a)(1)(C), or

children.label: IV
children.text: the payee does not provide a certification to such broker under subparagraph (C),

children.heading: Time for payee to provide certification to broker
children.label: C Time for payee to provide certification to broker
i
children.text: at any time after the payee’s account with the broker was established and before the acquisition of such instrument, or

children.label: ii
children.text: in connection with the acquisition of such instrument.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of interest or any other amount of a kind reportable under section 6049, with respect to any account (whatever called) established before , or with respect to any instrument acquired before ,January 1, 1984January 1, 1984

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of dividends or any other amount reportable under section 6042, on any stock or other instrument acquired before , orJanuary 1, 1984

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of patronage dividends or other amounts of a kind reportable under section 6044, with respect to any membership acquired, or contract entered into, before .January 1, 1984

children.heading: Exception for readily tradable instruments acquired through existing brokerage accounts
children.label: 4 Exception for readily tradable instruments acquired through existing brokerage accounts
A
children.text: such account was established before , andJanuary 1, 1984

children.label: B
children.text: during 1983, such broker bought or sold instruments for the payee (or acted as a nominee for the payee) through such account.

children.heading: Period for which withholding is in effect
children.label: e Period for which withholding is in effect

children.heading: Failure to furnish TIN
children.label: 1 Failure to furnish TIN
children.text: In the case of any failure by a payee to furnish his TIN to a payor in the manner required, subsection (a) shall apply to any reportable payment made by such payor during the period during which the TIN has not been furnished in the manner required. The Secretary may require that a TIN required to be furnished under subsection (a)(1)(A) be provided under penalties of perjury only with respect to interest, dividends, patronage dividends, and amounts subject to broker reporting.

children.label: A
children.text: after the close of the 30th day after the day on which the payor received such notification, and

children.label: B
children.text: before the payee furnishes another TIN in the manner required.

children.heading: Notified payee underreporting described in subsection (c)
children.label: 3 Notified payee underreporting described in subsection (c)
i
children.text: after the close of the 30th day after the day on which the payor received notification from the Secretary of such underreporting, and

children.label: ii
children.text: before the stop date.

children.label: i
children.text: the day on which the payor received notification from the Secretary under subsection (c)(3)(B) to stop withholding, or

children.label: ii
children.text: the day on which the payor receives from the payee a certification provided by the Secretary under subsection (c)(3)(B).

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), the determination effective date of any determination under subsection (c)(3)(A) which is made during the 12-month period ending on October 15 of any calendar year shall be the first January 1 following such October 15.

children.heading: Determination that there was no under­reporting; hardship
children.label: ii Determination that there was no under­reporting; hardship
children.text: In the case of any determination under clause (i) or (iii) of subsection (c)(3)(A), the determination effective date shall be the date on which the Secretary’s determination is made.

children.heading: Failure to provide certification that payee is not subject to withholding
children.label: 4 Failure to provide certification that payee is not subject to withholding

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of any payee certification failure described in subsection (d)(1), subsection (a) shall apply to any reportable interest or dividend payment made during the period during which the certification described in subsection (d)(1) has not been furnished to the payor.

children.heading: Special rule for readily tradable instruments acquired through broker where notification
children.label: B Special rule for readily tradable instruments acquired through broker where notification
children.text: In the case of any readily tradable instrument acquired by the payee through a broker, the period described in subparagraph (A) shall start with payments to the payee made after the close of the 30th day after the payor receives notification from a broker under subsection (d)(2)(B).

children.heading: Start-up
children.label: A Start-up
children.text: If the payor elects the application of this subparagraph with respect to the payee, subsection (a) shall also apply to any reportable payment made during the 30-day period described in paragraph (2)(A), (3)(A), or (4)(B).

children.heading: Stopping
children.label: B Stopping
children.text: Unless the payor elects not to have this subparagraph apply with respect to the payee, subsection (a) shall also apply to any reportable payment made after the close of the period described in paragraph (1), (2), or (4) (as the case may be) and before the 30th day after the close of such period. A similar rule shall also apply with respect to the period described in paragraph (3)(A) where the stop date is determined under clause (i) or (ii) of paragraph (3)(B).

children.heading: Election of shorter grace period
children.label: C Election of shorter grace period
children.text: The payor may elect a period shorter than the grace period set forth in subparagraph (A) or (B), as the case may be.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: No person may use any information obtained under this section (including any failure to certify under subsection (d)) except for purposes of meeting any requirement under this section or (subject to the safeguards set forth in section 6103) for purposes permitted under section 6103.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: 2 Cross reference
children.text: For provision providing for civil damages for violation of paragraph (1), see section 7431.

children.label: A
children.text: any organization or governmental unit described in subparagraph (B), (C), (D), (E), or (F) of section 6049(b)(4), or

children.label: B
children.text: any other person specified in regulations.

children.heading: Amounts for which withholding otherwise required
children.label: 2 Amounts for which withholding otherwise required
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply to any amount for which withholding is otherwise required by this title.

children.heading: Exemption while waiting for TIN
children.label: 3 Exemption while waiting for TIN
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations for exemptions from the tax imposed by subsection (a) during the period during which a person is waiting for receipt of a TIN.

children.heading: Other definitions and special rules
children.label: h Other definitions and special rules

children.heading: Obviously incorrect number
children.label: 1 Obviously incorrect number
children.text: A person shall be treated as failing to furnish his TIN if the TIN furnished does not contain the proper number of digits.

children.heading: Payee furnishes 2 incorrect TINs
children.label: 2 Payee furnishes 2 incorrect TINs
children.text: If the payee furnishes the payor 2 incorrect TINs in any 3-year period, the payor shall, after receiving notice of the second incorrect TIN, treat the payee as not having furnished another TIN under subsection (e)(2)(B) until the day on which the payor receives notification from the Secretary that a correct TIN has been furnished.

children.heading: Joint payees
children.label: 3 Joint payees
children.text: Except to the extent otherwise provided in regulations, any payment to joint payees shall be treated as if all the payment were made to the first person listed in the payment.

children.heading: Payor defined
children.label: 4 Payor defined
children.text: The term “payor” means, with respect to any reportable payment, a person required to file a return described in paragraph (2) or (3) of subsection (b) with respect to such payment.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “broker” has the meaning given to such term by section 6045(c)(1).

children.heading: Only 1 broker per acquisition
children.label: B Only 1 broker per acquisition
children.text: If, but for this subparagraph, there would be more than 1 broker with respect to any acquisition, only the broker having the closest contact with the payee shall be treated as the broker.

children.heading: Payor not treated as broker
children.label: C Payor not treated as broker
children.text: In the case of any instrument, such term shall not include any person who is the payor with respect to such instrument.

children.heading: Real estate broker not treated as a broker
children.label: D Real estate broker not treated as a broker
children.text: Except as provided by regulations, such term shall not include any real estate broker (as defined in section 6045(e)(2)).

children.label: A
children.text: any instrument which is part of an issue any portion of which is traded on an established securities market (within the meaning of section 453(f)(5)), and

children.label: B
children.text: except as otherwise provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary, any instrument which is regularly quoted by brokers or dealers making a market.

children.heading: Original issue discount
children.label: 7 Original issue discount
children.text: To the extent provided in regulations, rules similar to the rules of paragraph (6) of section 6049(d) shall apply.

children.heading: Requirement of notice to payee
children.label: 8 Requirement of notice to payee
children.text: Whenever the Secretary notifies a payor under paragraph (1)(B) of subsection (a) that the TIN furnished by any payee is incorrect, the Secretary shall at the same time furnish a copy of such notice to the payor, and the payor shall promptly furnish such copy to the payee.

children.heading: Requirement of notice to Secretary
children.label: 9 Requirement of notice to Secretary
children.text: If the Secretary notifies a payor under paragraph (1)(B) of subsection (a) that the TIN furnished by any payee is incorrect and such payee subsequently furnishes another TIN to the payor, the payor shall promptly notify the Secretary of the other TIN so furnished.

children.heading: Coordination with other sections
children.label: 10 Coordination with other sections
children.text: For purposes of section 31, this chapter (other than section 3402(n)), and so much of subtitle F (other than section 7205) as relates to this chapter, payments which are subject to withholding under this section shall be treated as if they were wages paid by an employer to an employee (and amounts deducted and withheld under this section shall be treated as if deducted and withheld under section 3402).

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: i Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out the purposes of this section.
